videoSnippet.title: Return of the Ding!
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Chen, Qi b (2484) - Ding, Liren (2734) (https://lichess.org/broadcast/2026-chinese-team-chess-championship--men/round-1/Whsfml5s/kyDBgDen) [1.9] 
B12 2026.04.19

1.e4 c6 2.d4 d5 3.e5 Bf5 4.h4 h5 5.c4 e6 6.Nc3 dxc4 7.Bxc4 Nd7 8.Nge2 Be7 9.g3 Nh6 10.Bxh6 Rxh6 11.a3 Qb6 12.b4 a5 13.b5 c5 14.Na4 Qc7 15.Rc1 cxd4 16.Bxe6 Qxe5 17.Bxf5 Qxf5 18.O-O d3 19.Nf4 Ne5 20.Rc7 Rd8 21.Re1 Kf8 22.Nc3 Bxa3 23.Ncd5 Bb4 24.Re3 d2 25.f3 Rhd6
